description: Open-source AI gateway for routing, managing, and observing LLM API traffic
name: raven

scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/api && uv run alembic upgrade head
scripts.db:revision: cd apps/api && uv run alembic revision --autogenerate -m
scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run python -m uvicorn src.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4000 --reload
scripts.dev:cron: cd apps/cron && uv run python -m src.main
scripts.lint: biome check --write . && cd apps/api && uv run ruff check src/
